title: lathyrus laevigatus var. subalpinus
intro: Lathyrus laevigatus var. subalpinus, also known as Alpine pea, is a variety of the Lathyrus laevigatus plant, a flowering plant in the pea family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting neuroprotective effects. Alpine pea can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used as an ingredient in traditional remedies, such as poultices and salves.
